prose:
Fukui Reactivity Indices, Dual Descriptor, Most Electrophilic and Most Nucleophilic sites were computed for acrolein.

**Method Provenance Block:**
Fukui Reactivity Indices, Dual Descriptor, Most Electrophilic and Most Nucleophilic sites — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: provided from `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/acrolein/acrolein.xyz`. Mulliken partial charges were used to compute the Fukui functions. SCF converged.

**Fukui Indices and Dual Descriptors for Acrolein:**
| Atom Index | Symbol | Fukui f+ (Electrophilic Attack) | Fukui f- (Nucleophilic Attack) | Fukui f0 (Radical Attack) | Dual Descriptor (f2) |

|     0      |   O    |             0.40136             |            0.39389             |          0.39763          |       0.00748        |
|     1      |   C    |             0.02226             |            0.00599             |          0.01412          |       0.01627        |
|     2      |   C    |             0.43405             |            0.09140             |          0.26272          |       0.34264        |
|     3      |   C    |             0.64232             |            0.08737             |          0.36485          |       0.55495        |
|     4      |   H    |            -0.15726             |            0.08596             |          -0.03565         |       -0.24322       |
|     5      |   H    |            -0.20720             |            0.18568             |          -0.01076         |       -0.39288       |
|     6      |   H    |            -0.06212             |            0.08449             |          0.01118          |       -0.14660       |
|     7      |   H    |            -0.07341             |            0.06523             |          -0.00409         |       -0.13863       |

**Most Electrophilic Site:** Atom 3 (C) with f+ = 0.64232.
**Most Nucleophilic Site:** Atom 0 (O) with f- = 0.39389.

**Files:**
